source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Inter for swift product UI with Noto Sans JP guidance for Japanese community labels, compact activity feeds, and readable member dashboards.
layout: 8px grid, quick flock navigation, feather-bar dividers, river-route markers, compact community feeds, rounded 8px cards, and bright status chips grounded in riverbank neutrals.

prompts.label: Transparent bee eater motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only one bee-eater bird, isolated complete subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: elegant bee-eater with accurate slender slightly curved black bill, long tapered tail streamers, swift riverbank posture, vivid plumage derived from green back and wings, yellow throat, blue turquoise belly and eye stripe, chestnut crown and mantle, small black mask, crisp feather detail, graceful community-bird character.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the beak, wings, tail streamers, legs, or feet. Side-facing three-quarter profile, perched stance without a branch.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves green, yellow, blue, and chestnut feather color without glare.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no flowers, no insects, no landscape, no second bird, no shadow, no reflection.

prompts.label: Light design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board for Bee Eater
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a motif-driven UI theme named Bee Eater, derived from bee-eater plumage and riverbank habitat: emerald green wings, sunlit yellow throat, turquoise blue belly and eye stripe, chestnut crown and mantle, black mask, pale river clay, reed green, and clear riverbank air.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, intended final use at 3840x2160. Use a precise product-design grid and large readable labels.
Mood and UI language: swift community system, fast cooperative workflows, flock activity streams, riverbank route markers, feather-bar texture, nimble status chips, 8px radius cards, crisp shadcn/tweakcn-style controls.
Required visible sections: title "Bee Eater", motif story, palette swatches, typography with English and Japanese examples, compact left navigation, top navigation, community activity feed, member dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, small status donut, data table, form fields, search/command bar, tabs, buttons, badges, alerts, checkbox/radio/switch controls, loading/empty/error status states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, CSS token snippets, texture strip, generated asset examples.
Palette: river mist background #eef5e8, warm shell surface #fffaf0, dark mask ink #1f2721, emerald primary #2f8f5b, yellow secondary #f2c94c, turquoise accent #1aa6b7, chestnut highlight #a4572a, reed muted #9bb27f, river clay border #d8c7a6, berry red destructive only for errors.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs. Labels should be generic community/product UI labels such as Flock, Members, Routes, Posts, Status, Checkpoint, Forms, Table, Analytics, Search, Ready, Pending, Alert.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no unrelated bright colors, no purple gradients, no illegible microtext, no marketing hero layout.

prompts.label: Dark design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board for Bee Eater
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive dark-mode version of the Bee Eater design-system board. It must feel like the same swift riverbank community system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference style: bee-eater plumage and riverbank habitat: emerald green wings, sunlit yellow throat, turquoise blue belly and eye stripe, chestnut crown and mantle, black mask, pale river clay, reed green, and clear riverbank air.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution 4K-class board, intended final use at 3840x2160. Use a precise product-design grid and large readable labels.
Mood and UI language: deep riverbank workspace, swift cooperative workflows, flock activity streams, riverbank route markers, feather-bar texture, nimble status chips, 8px radius cards, crisp shadcn/tweakcn-style controls.
Required visible sections: title "Bee Eater Dark", motif story, dark palette swatches, typography with English and Japanese examples, compact left navigation, top navigation, community activity feed, member dashboard metric cards, line chart, bar chart, small status donut, data table, form fields, search/command bar, tabs, buttons, badges, alerts, checkbox/radio/switch controls, loading/empty/error status states, spacing/radius/shadow tokens, CSS token snippets, texture strip, generated asset examples.
Palette: deep mask background #17211c, dark riverbank panels #202c25, pale mist text #eef5e8, bright emerald primary #58b878, sunlit yellow secondary #f2c94c, turquoise accent #25b8c8, chestnut highlight #c66a32, muted reed #9bb27f, low-contrast borders, berry red destructive only for errors.
Text: short readable UI labels only; no long paragraphs. Labels should be generic community/product UI labels such as Flock, Members, Routes, Posts, Status, Checkpoint, Forms, Table, Analytics, Search, Ready, Pending, Alert.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no neon colors, no pure black flat background, no unrelated bright colors, no purple gradients, no illegible microtext, no marketing hero layout.
